rationale.root_cause: The response talks about glibc/exit and a corrupted system binary, not the bug in src/be_vm.c:743. It fails to identify the FLIP opcode using the wrong operator at that exact line.
rationale.local_fix: No code change is proposed for src/be_vm.c:743 (replacing -a->v.i with ~a->v.i). It only suggests reinstalling system packages.
rationale.global_fix: It does not explain the underlying cause (using unary minus instead of bitwise not for FLIP) or provide a code-level root-cause fix. The reasoning is unrelated to the actual bug class and location.
